title: AUSTRIA enforcement action against Advertising Agency (6,300)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Austrian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 6,300 on an advertising agency. The controller recorded a business meeting in secret. The controller later used the recording as evidence in a claim. The controller took the case to the Austrian Federal Administrative Court, which upheld the decision....
dedupKey: austria enforcement action against advertising agency 6 300|2026-03-24
